summary: Iteration 4 testing: Recurring Transactions feature fully tested. Backend 11/11 tests passed. Frontend all features working correctly including language toggle FR/EN.
critical_code_review_comments: RecurringPage: Good use of data-testid for testability. Stats section correctly calculates active/inactive counts.
useRecurringTransactions hook: Clean CRUD implementation with proper refetch after mutations.
LanguageContext: ~180 translation keys properly implemented for FR/EN.
seed_data_creation: Generated transactions for 2025-02, 2025-03, 2025-04 during testing. TEST_ prefixed items cleaned up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All recurring transaction features verified: (1) GET /api/recurring-transactions returns 4 seed templates. (2) POST creates new recurring templates. (3) PUT updates including is_active toggle. (4) DELETE removes templates with confirmation. (5) POST /api/recurring-transactions/generate/{year}/{month} creates transactions from active templates. (6) Inactive templates excluded from generation. (7) RecurringPage displays table with all fields. (8) Add/Edit modal works with type/category/description/amount/recurrence_day fields. (9) Toggle status button (Power icon) works with toast feedback. (10) Generate Month modal with year/month selectors works. (11) Delete confirmation dialog works. (12) Language toggle FR/EN works on all pages - sidebar nav labels change correctly. (13) Navigation to /recurring works via sidebar.

features_tested.recurring_list: PASS - 4 templates displayed with all fields
features_tested.add_recurring_modal: PASS - Opens with correct form fields
features_tested.toggle_status: PASS - Power icon toggles is_active with toast feedback
features_tested.generate_month: PASS - Modal with year/month selectors, generates transactions
features_tested.sidebar_navigation: PASS - Recurring Transactions nav item works
